title: Observatory Readout
summary: An astronomical control desk at 2 a.m. Five rail buttons are five distinct celestial marks; Fraunces + Public Sans carry the antique-instrument voice; one warm amber star is the only chromatic event.
darkAccent: warm amber #E5A24A — active dock left bar + saving pill + toggle on-state
typeface: Fraunces (display / pane titles) + Public Sans (body and forms)
railTreatment: five distinct inline-SVG celestial marks: ringed dot · italic SM ligature · transit-line dash · three horizon bars · vertical log-stack (lines of unequal length + trailing dot)
